title: Standable Striders
description: Allows players to stand on Striders like Happy Ghasts
body:
## Description

__Standable Striders__ is a simple mod that allows players to stand on Striders as if they were solid platforms.
___
![The player stands on a saddled strider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eZrq65Ys/images/053172e277d11b2284888cda8d5a922921fca0af.png)
___
Striders no longer behave like slippery mobs when a player stands on them – they remain stationary, allowing safe standing, jumping, and interaction, similar to Happy Ghasts.

This is especially useful for:

* Safely dismounting from a Strider

* Building or modifying structures over lava lakes

* Any situation where stable footing on a Strider is needed

## Configuration

<details>
<summary>Standable_Striders.json</summary>

```json
{
  "=====| Standable Striders |=====": {
    "Enabled": true,
    "Apply only to saddled Striders": false
  }
}
```
</details>

### Commands

- `/standablestriders` `reload`				:: Reloads the configuration

- `/standablestriders` `config`				:: Opens the config file

- `/standablestriders` `enable/disable`		:: Enable / disable the mod

- `/standablestriders` `status`				:: Shows the mod’s current status
